title: anthemis mauritiana subsp. faurei
intro: Anthemis mauritiana subsp. faurei, also known as the medicinal chamomile, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the island of Mauritius. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Anthemis mauritiana subsp. faurei include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, or to promote overall well-being.
